_comment: Real lock-and-mint bridge routes, each verified live (locked collateral ≥ minted supply) before inclusion. Escrows and mappings can change — re-verify against each bridge's own docs/contracts before relying on a number; override the whole set with EVMSEC_BRIDGES=/path/to/your.json. Contributions of verified routes welcome.

routes.notes: USDC bridged to Polygon PoS as USDC.e. Escrow is the Polygon PoS ERC20 predicate (holds locked ERC20s for the RootChainManager). Escrow: https://etherscan.io/address/0x40ec5B33f54e0E8A33A975908C5BA1c14e5BbbDf — verified BACKED at seed time.
DAI bridged to Polygon PoS via the ERC20 predicate. Escrow: https://etherscan.io/address/0x40ec5B33f54e0E8A33A975908C5BA1c14e5BbbDf — verified BACKED at seed time (mildly over-collateralized).
WBTC bridged to Polygon PoS via the ERC20 predicate. Escrow: https://etherscan.io/address/0x40ec5B33f54e0E8A33A975908C5BA1c14e5BbbDf — verified BACKED at seed time.
DAI bridged to Arbitrum One via MakerDAO's dedicated L1 escrow. Escrow: https://etherscan.io/address/0xA10c7CE4b876998858b1a9E12b10092229539400 — verified BACKED at seed time.
WBTC bridged to Arbitrum One via the standard L1 ERC20 gateway. Escrow: https://etherscan.io/address/0xa3A7B6F88361F48403514059F1F16C8E78d60EeC — verified BACKED at seed time.
LINK bridged to Arbitrum One via the standard L1 ERC20 gateway. Escrow: https://etherscan.io/address/0xa3A7B6F88361F48403514059F1F16C8E78d60EeC — verified BACKED at seed time.
